sessions.title: Post to Discord when a new RSS item matches a…

messages.text: Post to Discord when a new RSS item matches a keyword
To create a workflow that posts to Discord when a new RSS item matches a keyword, we need to clarify a few details. We will use the RSS feed as the trigger and Discord as the action.

questions: What is the URL of the RSS feed you want to monitor?
What keyword do you want to match in the RSS items?
Which Discord channel do you want to post the matching items to?
suggestedTemplates: Monitor RSS feed for specific keywords and send email notifications
Post new RSS items to a Slack channel
Trigger a webhook when an RSS item matches a certain condition

messages.text: Post new RSS items to a Slack channel

To post new RSS items to a Slack channel, we need to define the specifics of the workflow. The RSS feed will serve as the trigger, and Slack will be the action. We'll need to determine the details of the RSS feed and the Slack channel.

questions: What is the URL of the RSS feed you want to monitor?
What is the name of the Slack channel where you want to post new RSS items?
suggestedTemplates: Post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel
Send new Reddit posts to a Discord server
Forward new email notifications to a Slack channel

messages.text: Post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel

To post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel, we'll need to define the specifics of the workflow. The GitHub issues will serve as the trigger, and Slack will be the action. We'll need to determine the details of the GitHub repository and the Slack channel. 
   Please consider the following:
   * Which GitHub repository should we monitor for new issues?
   * What type of issues should we post to Slack (e.g. all issues, issues with specific labels)?
   * Which Slack channel should we post the issues to?
   * What information about the issue should we include in the Slack post (e.g. title, description, assignee)?

questions: Which GitHub repository should we monitor for new issues?
What type of issues should we post to Slack?
suggestedTemplates: Post new GitHub issues with specific labels to a Slack channel
Post all new GitHub issues to a Slack channel
Post new GitHub issues assigned to a specific user to a Slack channel

Post new GitHub issues assigned to a team to a Slack channel

messages.text: Post new GitHub issues with specific labels to a Slack channel

   Please consider the following:

   * What specific labels should we look for in the issues (e.g. 'bug', 'feature request')?
   * Which Slack channel should we post the issues to?
   * What information about the issue should we include in the Slack post (e.g. title, description, assignee)?
